greenfield.condition: LOS match + no VOI/VOE provider detected
greenfield.description: Greenfield opportunity — no existing verification provider
greenfield.angle: New implementation, emphasize speed-to-market and compliance coverage

displacement.condition: LOS match + legacy VOI provider (Work Number, Equifax, PointServ)
displacement.description: Displacement play — legacy provider with high costs
displacement.angle: Cost savings and faster turnaround vs Work Number/Equifax

competitive.condition: LOS match + modern VOI competitor (Truework, Argyle, Plaid, Finicity, FormFree)
competitive.description: Competitive deal — modern provider already in place
competitive.angle: Differentiation on coverage, accuracy, and borrower experience

no_match.condition: No LOS detected in tech stack
no_match.description: Likely not in mortgage/lending — noted but doesn't penalize
no_match.angle: Explore other verification use cases (HR, tenant screening, background checks)
